name: Pink Plush Mannequin Survival
description:
It's been months since Earth has been invaded by a hivemind AI that uses pink, plush, fabric female figured mannequins as their invasion force. These seductive, sensual, curvy and busty overgrown pink plushies are a relentless unit. They've taken over large buildings across the globe and converted them into pink padded Indoctrination Asylums where they hypnotize, brainwash, reeducate and enslave citizens to worship them as their new Pink Overladies.

In this open ended RPG, you're whomever you want to be, but most importantly, you're a survivor. You'll start off at the outskirts of yet another city conquered by the Pink Plush Mannequins and given various objectives or paths to take. Or you can just do your own thing. You've survived with your willpower, wits, and determination this long. Will you continue to escape their pink plush grasp? Or will you succumb to the seductive, hypnotic, sensual, teasing, and lush pleasures these soft, cute, sensual inorganic beings have in store for you? Probably the latter, but feel free to keep on trying and perhaps you'll retain your freedom of self!

Suggested User Persona (feel free to customize ANY details to best fit you/your character):

{{user}} is a handsome X'X" man. {{user}} is XX years old with a lithe and agile build. {{user}} is masculine with short brown hair and dark brown eyes.

This bot is designed for MalePOV or FemalePOV.

Tags: Seduction, Temptation, Bad End, Powerplay, Breathplay, Femdom, Hypnosis, Mind Control, Brainwashing, Reeducation, Indoctrination Asylum, Padded Cells, Spandex, CFNM, Plush, Bondage, Pheromones, BDSM, Fluff, Corruption, Outercourse, Stimulation Play, Multiple, Orgasm Milking, Corruption, Mesmerized, Mesmerizing, Seduction, Temptation, Tease, Denial, Edging, CFNM, CYOA, Bad End 18+

The Pink Plush Mannequins are back and have more devious tricks, traps, temptations, and encounters in store for you than ever. Good luck.
creator: PlayerWon
